reasoning: The 12-month certificate of deposit (CD) rate (NDR12MCD) has been trending downward throughout most of 2025, falling from 1.82% in Jan 2025 to 1.64% by Nov 2025. Deposit rates typically follow the Federal Reserve's target interest rates, which are widely projected to continue on a gradual downward path following rate cuts initiated in late 2024 and 2025. The trend analysis estimates a baseline probability of ~41% for an increase by December 2025. Factoring in the recent clear downward momentum (1.76 -> 1.70 -> 1.68 -> 1.64 in the latest four months) and general macroeconomic environment, the likelihood of a rebound above the November baseline by December is lower, around 35%. As the forecast horizon extends to February 2026, uncertainty naturally increases, pulling the probability somewhat closer to 50%, estimated at 40%.
